code:
%% Sequence Diagram: Play Command Flow %% Purpose: Shows the complete flow when a user executes /play command %% Author: Discord Bot Team %% Last Updated: 2025-11-03 sequenceDiagram autonumber actor User as 👤 Discord User participant Discord as Discord API participant Gateway as Gateway Service participant Redis as Redis Pub/Sub participant Audio as Audio Service participant DB as PostgreSQL participant Lavalink as Lavalink participant YouTube as YouTube API Note over User,YouTube: User wants to play a song in voice channel %% Command Initiation User->>Discord: /play query: "never gonna give you up" activate Discord Discord->>Gateway: INTERACTION_CREATE event activate Gateway Note over Gateway: Validate interaction
Check permissions Gateway->>Discord: POST /interactions/{Education_StudentDB}/callback
(Education_LMS_Portal) Discord->>User: Show processing message deactivate Discord %% Command Processing Gateway->>DB: SELECT * FROM guild_settings
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Gateway: Guild settings (Education_LMS_Portal) deactivate DB Gateway->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:commands
{Education_GradeSync} activate Redis Note over Redis: Message queued in pub/sub Redis->>Audio: Message delivered deactivate Redis activate Audio %% Audio Service Processing Note over Audio: Extract query and guild info Audio->>DB: SELECT * FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Audio: Current queue (Education_LMS_Portal) deactivate DB %% Search for Track alt Query is YouTube URL Note over Audio: Parse YouTube URL
Extract video ID else Query is search term Audio->>Lavalink: GET /loadtracks?identifier=ytsearch:{Education_LMS_Portal} activate Lavalink Lavalink->>YouTube: Search API request activate YouTube YouTube-->>Lavalink: Search results deactivate YouTube Lavalink-->>Audio: Track results (Education_ContentCDN) deactivate Lavalink Note over Audio: Select first result end %% Cache Search Results Audio->>Redis: SETEX search:{Education_GradeSync} 300 {Education_GradeSync} activate Redis Redis-->>Audio: OK deactivate Redis %% Add to Queue alt Queue is empty Note over Audio: This will be the first track Audio->>DB: INSERT INTO queue
(Education_StudentDB) activate DB DB-->>Audio: Queue entry created (Education_ClassroomService) deactivate DB %% Start Playback Audio->>Lavalink: POST /sessions/{Education_StudentDB}/players/{Education_LMS_Portal}
{Education_LMS_Portal} } activate Lavalink Note over Lavalink: Create player
Connect to voice channel Lavalink->>Discord: Voice connection (Education_ContentCDN) activate Discord Discord-->>Lavalink: Voice connection established deactivate Discord Lavalink->>YouTube: Stream audio data activate YouTube Note over Lavalink: Download and encode audio YouTube-->>Lavalink: Audio stream deactivate YouTube Lavalink->>Discord: Send opus packets (Education_LMS_Portal) activate Discord Discord->>User: 🎵 Audio playback in voice channel deactivate Discord Lavalink-->>Audio: Player updated event deactivate Lavalink else Queue has tracks Note over Audio: Add to end of queue Audio->>DB: SELECT MAX(Education_ContentCDN) FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Audio: maxPosition deactivate DB Audio->>DB: INSERT INTO queue
(Education_GradeSync) activate DB DB-->>Audio: Queue entry created deactivate DB end %% Update Cache Audio->>Redis: SET queue:{Education_LMS_Portal} {Education_StudentDB}
EX 3600 activate Redis Redis-->>Audio: OK deactivate Redis %% Send UI Update alt First track (Education_ContentCDN) Audio->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:ui:now
{Education_StudentDB}, ... } activate Redis Redis->>Gateway: UI update message deactivate Redis Gateway->>Discord: POST /channels/{Education_GradeSync}/messages
{Education_LMS_Portal], components: [Education_ClassroomService] } activate Discord Discord->>User: 🎵 Now Playing: Song Title
[Education_GradeSync] deactivate Discord Gateway->>Discord: DELETE /webhooks/{Education_ContentCDN}/messages/@original
(Education_LMS_Portal) activate Discord deactivate Discord else Added to queue Gateway->>Discord: POST /webhooks/{Education_LMS_Portal}/messages/@original
{Education_LMS_Portal)", ephemeral: true } activate Discord Discord->>User: ✅ Added to queue (Education_StudentDB) deactivate Discord end deactivate Gateway deactivate Audio Note over User,YouTube: User hears music playing in voice channel %% Track Events loop Every 5 seconds Lavalink->>Audio: PlayerUpdate event
{Education_GradeSync} activate Audio Audio->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:to-discord
{Education_GradeSync} activate Redis Redis->>Gateway: Player update event deactivate Redis Note over Gateway: Update UI if needed
(Education_ContentCDN) deactivate Audio end %% Track End Note over Lavalink,Audio: Track finishes playing Lavalink->>Audio: TrackEnd event
{Education_GradeSync} activate Audio Audio->>DB: DELETE FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? AND position = 0 activate DB DB-->>Audio: Deleted deactivate DB Audio->>DB: UPDATE queue SET position = position - 1
WHERE guildId = ? activate DB DB-->>Audio: Queue reindexed deactivate DB alt More tracks in queue Audio->>DB: SELECT * FROM queue
WHERE guildId = ? AND position = 0 activate DB DB-->>Audio: Next track deactivate DB Note over Audio: Play next track
(Education_StudentDB) else Queue empty and autoplay enabled Note over Audio: Generate autoplay recommendation Audio->>Audio: Get similar tracks
based on last played Note over Audio: Add to queue and play else Queue empty and autoplay disabled Audio->>Lavalink: DELETE /sessions/{Education_StudentDB}/players/{Education_StudentDB} activate Lavalink Lavalink-->>Audio: Player destroyed deactivate Lavalink Audio->>Redis: PUBLISH discord-bot:ui:now
{Education_LMS_Portal} activate Redis Redis->>Gateway: Queue empty event deactivate Redis Gateway->>Discord: PATCH /channels/{Education_LMS_Portal}/messages/{Education_ClassroomService}
{Education_ContentCDN] } activate Discord Discord->>User: Queue finished (Education_StudentDB) deactivate Discord end deactivate Audio Note over User,YouTube: Flow complete

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的时序图，展示用户执行/play命令后的整个流程。这个流程涉及Discord API、Gateway Service、Audio Service，还有Lavalink和YouTube API的交互。
明白了。我先确认一下参与者的层级关系：用户通过Discord API发起，Gateway Service作为命令入口，然后Audio Service处理核心业务逻辑，最后Lavalink负责实际的音频播放。Redis和PostgreSQL作为中间件也要画进去吗？
对的，Redis Pub/Sub和PostgreSQL都要包含。Redis用于消息队列和缓存，PostgreSQL存储队列状态和公会设置。还有，Gateway和Audio Service之间是通过Redis解耦的，不是直接调用。
好的，我先画出基础参与者结构。从左到右依次是：User、Discord API、Gateway Service、Redis Pub/Sub、Audio Service、PostgreSQL、Lavalink、YouTube API。顶部加一个注释说明整体目的。
现在画命令发起阶段。用户输入"/play never gonna give you up"，Discord API发送INTERACTION_CREATE事件给Gateway，Gateway要先验证权限，然后立即回复一个处理中的消息给用户。
画好了命令发起部分。我注意到Gateway回复Discord时用了POST /interactions/{id}/callback，这个路径里的{id}应该是交互ID吧？还有回调类型是DEFERRED_CHANNEL_MESSAGE_WITH_SOURCE？
是的，就是那个延迟响应。接下来Gateway要从PostgreSQL读取公会设置，然后通过Redis Pub/Sub发布命令消息，由Audio Service消费。
已添加：Gateway查询guild_settings表，然后PUBLISH到discord-bot:commands频道。Audio Service订阅后接收消息。我在Redis上方加了个注释说明消息队列机制。
Audio Service拿到消息后，先查当前队列状态。然后关键来了：要判断用户输入的是YouTube链接还是搜索词。如果是链接直接解析，如果是搜索词要走Lavalink去YouTube API搜索。
画了一个alt块处理这个分支。YouTube URL分支直接解析，搜索词分支走Lavalink的/loadtracks接口，ytsearch前缀。Lavalink再去调YouTube API，返回后Audio Service取第一个结果。
搜索结果需要缓存一下，设置300秒过期。然后判断队列是否为空：如果为空要立即开始播放，如果不为空就追加到队列末尾。这两个分支都要画清楚。
添加了SETEX缓存搜索结果。然后第二个alt块：队列为空时，INSERT新记录到queue表，然后Audio Service调用Lavalink创建player并连接语音频道，Lavalink从YouTube拉取音频流，编码后发送opus包给Discord。
语音连接建立后，Lavalink会触发PlayerUpdate事件吗？还是在播放过程中周期性上报？
周期性上报，我后面会画一个loop。先继续完成队列非空的分支：此时只需要INSERT到queue，不需要立即播放。然后更新Redis缓存整个队列状态。
对，缓存队列3600秒。然后UI更新也要区分：如果是第一首歌，要发"Now Playing"消息并删除原来的处理中消息；如果是追加队列，要回复"Added to queue"的临时消息。
画了第三个alt块处理UI更新。第一首歌时，Audio通过Redis通知Gateway，Gateway发新消息并删除原webhook消息。追加队列时，Gateway直接编辑原webhook回复。两个分支都标注了具体的emoji和按钮组件。
现在画播放中的状态同步。每5秒Lavalink给Audio Service发PlayerUpdate，Audio再发到Redis，Gateway消费后决定是否需要更新UI。这个loop要持续到歌曲结束。
添加了loop Every 5 seconds，包含Lavalink到Audio的PlayerUpdate，Audio PUBLISH到discord-bot:to-discord，Gateway接收后处理。注意这里Gateway只是"Update UI if needed"，不一定每次都调Discord API。
最后是歌曲结束后的处理。Lavalink发TrackEnd事件，Audio Service要：1）删除已播放的歌曲 2）重新索引队列位置 3）判断后续动作。这里有三个分支：还有下一首、自动推荐、或者队列结束销毁player。
画了TrackEnd处理：DELETE播放完的track，UPDATE position减1。然后alt三个分支：有下一首就继续播放；autoplay启用就生成推荐；autoplay禁用就DELETE player，发队列结束消息。
autoplay的分支里，Audio Service自己调用自己获取相似曲目，这个自调用要明确表示。还有销毁player后，Redis通知Gateway更新UI，Discord上显示"Queue finished"。
已添加Audio Service的自调用箭头，标注"Get similar tracks based on last played"。队列结束分支完整画了：DELETE player，PUBLISH queue empty事件，Gateway PATCH消息更新为结束状态。
整体流程看起来完整了。检查一下：所有activate/deactivate配对是否正确？特别是Lavalink和YouTube API在音频流部分，YouTube deactivate后Lavalink还要继续给Discord发opus包。
发现一个问题：YouTube API返回音频流后，我过早deactivate了YouTube，但Lavalink还在持续接收流数据。实际上YouTube应该保持activate直到流结束，或者表示为异步流。我调整一下，把YouTube的deactivate移到流结束后的虚线返回。
这样更准确。还有最后确认：所有Education_前缀的占位符都保留了吗？这些是系统生成的ID占位，不要改成真实值。
确认保留。Education_StudentDB用于交互ID和player session，Education_LMS_Portal用于guild ID和channel ID，Education_GradeSync用于消息数据和查询参数，Education_ContentCDN用于回调类型和组件，Education_ClassroomService用于数据库记录和消息ID。所有占位符位置正确。
顶部和底部再加两个注释，顶部说明整体目的，底部标记流程完成。还有作者信息和日期。
已添加：顶部Note "User wants to play a song in voice channel"，底部Note "User hears music playing in voice channel"和"Flow complete"。头部注释包含Purpose、Author、Last Updated: 2025-11-03。
